title: Glowberry Expansion
description: Adds more things related to glowberrys.
body:
Ever felt like glowberrys didn't have enough uses, or maybe you even felt like there should be more colors of glowberrys. Well if you did think one or both of those things than this mod is for you. This mod adds many new things such as refining glowberrys and three new glowberry colors.

Spoiler ![A mortar and pestle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95e843cf76b26e04af103671560c2251da80f27c.png) Mortar and Pestle - used in the processing of glowberrys ![a bottle with orange liquid](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d2592ffe81b82a1f36c1d74afde005e4e13b602.png) Glowberry Extract - used for crafting ![a bottle of blue liquid ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06017a238d0c797a15f4a59701993b38e9209cd3.png) Blue Glowberry Extract - used for powering engraved gems ![a chisel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/929bdca16d589c43a6456a45ce235b25f2ccc366.png) Chisel - used for engraving gems ![a diamond ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/092ae8deb7d23da984b51075abb619c1d0c6d61a.png) Engraved Diamond - summons lighting on right click ![Engraved Lapis](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/586b450b2541614adb10efbb6a28d7d9abcac265.png) Engraved Lapis - launches the player in the direction they're looking

Spoiler ![a block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0488b7352c5628c3979dbec3b6157f3cfe42482.png) Glowberry Refiner - used along with the Mortar and Pestle to process glowberrys ![a block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b132de29e4ad19d94870b4b407d68c47f7ea8dd.png) Gem Engraver - use with a chisel to engrave gems ![three lanterns](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08de68356dc115388f8e3df26a90f26bc0bbccb1.png) Glowberry Lantern - one empty one with a blue glowberry and one with a normal glowberry

Spoiler ![a glowberry cake](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68a50cfd61c6edf3429c9379c4950c6c46393086.png) Glowberry Cake - emits light depending on how many slices have eaten ![a set of glow armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ace3ab248e40d4aa0c4b99713c12357d6c02666.png) A set of glowing leather armor - spawns particles while equipped ![a glowberry pie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04c67fc5709cc3499b4228f36df7f35f13f09b74.png) Glowberry Pie - fills a bit more hunger than normal pie
## FAQ
Spoiler Q: Can I use this mod in my modpack? A: Yes, but please tell me about it in the [comments](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/glowberry-expansion/comments) on the Curseforge page. Q: Will there be a fabric port? A: A fabric port is curently in development and may be finished at some point in time. Star the repo if you want continued development. Feel free to contribute. Fabric source code: [here](https://github.com/TinyTaru/GlowberryExpansion-Fabric). Q: I found a bug. What do I do? A: Please report all bugs on [Github](https://github.com/TinyTaru/GlowberryExpantion/issues).
_(hover over roadmap items for descriptions)_ Looking for an addon check out [Glowberry Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/glowberry-delight) Want it in a modpack check the official [pack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/glowberry-expansion-the-modpack). Check out some other cool mods by mooredesign13 [https://www.curseforge.com/members/mooredesign13/projects](https://www.curseforge.com/members/mooredesign13/projects) Inspired by [Ponies of Fayra](https://poniesoffayra.com/)
